name: Illustrator MCP
description: MCP server for reading, manipulating, and exporting Adobe Illustrator design data

tools.name: get_document_info
tools.description: Get document metadata

tools.name: get_artboards
tools.description: Get all artboard information

tools.name: get_layers
tools.description: Get layer structure as a tree

tools.name: get_selection
tools.description: Get detailed information about selected objects

tools.name: list_text_frames
tools.description: List text frames with summary-level information

tools.name: get_text_frame_detail
tools.description: Get detailed text frame attributes including per-character runs and kerning

tools.name: get_colors
tools.description: Get all color information used in the document

tools.name: get_path_items
tools.description: Get path and shape data

tools.name: get_guidelines
tools.description: Get guide information

tools.name: get_groups
tools.description: Get structure of groups, clipping masks, and compound paths

tools.name: get_effects
tools.description: Get effect and appearance information

tools.name: get_images
tools.description: Get embedded and linked image information

tools.name: get_symbols
tools.description: Get symbol definitions and instances

tools.name: get_document_structure
tools.description: Get tree structure of layers, groups, and objects

tools.name: find_objects
tools.description: Search for objects by specified criteria

tools.name: check_contrast
tools.description: Check WCAG color contrast ratios

tools.name: extract_design_tokens
tools.description: Extract colors, typography, and spacing as design tokens

tools.name: export
tools.description: Export objects, groups, artboards, or selection

tools.name: export_pdf
tools.description: Export print-ready PDF

tools.name: get_overprint_info
tools.description: Get overprint settings with K100/rich black detection

tools.name: get_separation_info
tools.description: Get color separation information

tools.name: preflight_check
tools.description: Run pre-press quality checks

tools.name: check_text_consistency
tools.description: Analyze text frames for placeholder text and notation variations

tools.name: set_workflow
tools.description: Set session-level workflow and default coordinate system

tools.name: create_rectangle
tools.description: Create a rectangle

tools.name: create_ellipse
tools.description: Create an ellipse

tools.name: create_line
tools.description: Create a line

tools.name: create_text_frame
tools.description: Create a text frame

tools.name: create_path
tools.description: Create a custom path

tools.name: modify_object
tools.description: Modify properties of an existing object

tools.name: convert_to_outlines
tools.description: Convert text to outlines

tools.name: assign_color_profile
tools.description: Assign a color profile to the document

tools.name: place_image
tools.description: Place an image file into the document

tools.name: resize_for_variation
tools.description: Create size variations from a source artboard

tools.name: align_objects
tools.description: Align and/or distribute multiple objects

tools.name: replace_color
tools.description: Find and replace colors across the document

tools.name: manage_layers
tools.description: Add, rename, show/hide, lock/unlock, reorder, or delete layers

tools.name: place_color_chips
tools.description: Place color chip swatches with labels outside the artboard

tools.name: place_style_guide
tools.description: Place a visual style guide outside the artboard

tools.name: create_document
tools.description: Create a new Illustrator document

tools.name: close_document
tools.description: Close the active document

tools.name: save_document
tools.description: Save the active document

tools.name: open_document
tools.description: Open a document from a file path

tools.name: group_objects
tools.description: Group multiple objects

tools.name: ungroup_objects
tools.description: Ungroup a group

tools.name: duplicate_objects
tools.description: Duplicate one or more objects

tools.name: list_fonts
tools.description: List fonts available in Illustrator

tools.name: manage_artboards
tools.description: Add, remove, resize, rename, or rearrange artboards

tools.name: set_z_order
tools.description: Change the stacking order of an object

tools.name: move_to_layer
tools.description: Move objects to a different layer

tools.name: apply_graphic_style
tools.description: Apply a graphic style to objects

tools.name: list_graphic_styles
tools.description: List all graphic styles in the document

tools.name: manage_swatches
tools.description: Add, update, or delete swatches

tools.name: apply_text_style
tools.description: Apply a character or paragraph style to a text frame

tools.name: list_text_styles
tools.description: List all character and paragraph styles

tools.name: create_gradient
tools.description: Create a gradient and optionally apply to objects

tools.name: manage_linked_images
tools.description: Relink or embed a placed image

tools.name: undo
tools.description: Undo or redo actions

tools.name: manage_datasets
tools.description: List, apply, create datasets, bind variables, import CSV/XML

tools.name: place_symbol
tools.description: Place a symbol instance or replace symbol definition

tools.name: create_path_text
tools.description: Create text that flows along a path

tools.name: select_objects
tools.description: Select objects by UUID

tools.name: convert_coordinate
tools.description: Convert a point between coordinate systems
